title.rules: Must include brand name and primary product type. No promotional language or special characters.

description.rules: Must describe the product factually. No competitor mentions by name. No time-sensitive claims.

bullet_points.rules: Each bullet must start with a capitalized keyword. No HTML or special formatting.

search_keywords.rules: No brand names of competitors. No misleading terms. Single words or short phrases only.

prohibited_content: pricing or discount language in title or bullets
